# KPRIET Centre of Excellence in Hybrid & Electric Vehicles

> EV training, certification, research and industry workshops at KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology, Coimbatore.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the Centre of Excellence in Hybrid & Electric Vehicles.
- [About](/about): Mission, vision, and faculty of the CoE.
- [Courses](/courses): EV training and certification programs.
- [Events](/events): Upcoming workshops, seminars, and industry events.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Photos from past events and lab facilities.
- [Contact](/contact): Address, phone, and email of the centre.
- [Register](/register): Enrol in upcoming EV programs.
